div.style: color: #ffffff; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; width: 50%; vertical-align: top;

div.style: font-size: 12px; color: #999999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 6px;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; width: 50%; vertical-align: top;

div.style: font-size: 12px; color: #999999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 6px;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; vertical-align: top;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; vertical-align: top;

div.style: font-size: 12px; color: #999999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 6px;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; vertical-align: top;

div.style: font-size: 12px; color: #999999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 6px;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; vertical-align: top;

h3.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; color: #1a1a2e; margin: 0 0 18px 0; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 4px solid #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;

th.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: left; font-size: 12px; color: #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: right; font-size: 12px; color: #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: right; font-size: 12px; color: #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: right; font-size: 12px; color: #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: right; font-size: 12px; color: #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold;

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; color: #1a1a2e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #aaa; font-style: italic;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 18px; color: #1a1a2e; font-weight: bold;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #444; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #444; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #444; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 18px; color: #1a1a2e; text-align: right; font-weight: bold;

t.t-value: sum(line.price_subtotal for line in doc.job_card_lines if not line.display_type)
sum(line.price_total - line.price_subtotal for line in doc.job_card_lines if not line.display_type)

td.style: border: none !important; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #333; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #333; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #333; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 16px; color: #333; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: bold; color: #1a1a2e; text-align: right;
border: none !important; padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: bold; color: #1a1a2e; text-align: right;
